situation: audit-2026-07-02-002 finding AS-EC-016 (priority 13, route-fix): opt-worktree.sh cmd_list() line 721 declares 'local stat' which shadows the external /usr/bin/stat command. Current function body doesn't invoke stat(1), but any future addition (e.g., stat -c %Y for mtime) would silently resolve to the empty local variable instead of the binary, causing hard-to-diagnose failures.
action: Renamed 'local stat' → 'local diff_stat' and updated the assignment + interpolation sites within cmd_list(). Single-file route-fix touching only scripts/opt-worktree.sh.
